summary: Audience‑heavy recording but with a noticeably better mix than the previous version.
review: The sole reviewer notes that this tape still contains a lot of audience bleed, indicating an audience or matrix source, yet praises the improved balance compared with earlier releases. No comments are made about the musical performance itself, so the show quality remains unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it mentions a modest improvement in mix but persistent audience heaviness, leading to an average overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix is better than prior version, yet the recording remains very audience‑heavy with noticeable crowd noise throughout.
